title: Junior Business Development Manager at Sunteck Realty

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Sunteck Realty
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
